description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender, upright human form. The figure is extremely minimalistic, with a thin, elongated silhouette and no discernible facial or anatomical details. The body appears to be a single, continuous line with a slight widening at the base, suggesting the lower body or legs. There are no visible arms, clothing details, or accessories, and the overall shape is highly abstract. The proportions are consistent with a standing adult, but the lack of detail makes it difficult to distinguish gender or specific features. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with no visible texture or color variation.
description: A highly abstract, slender adult pedestrian figure with a smooth, continuous, and minimalistic form. The object lacks anatomical or clothing details and presents as a thin upright silhouette.
description_view_0: A front view showing the extremely thin, elongated profile with a slight widening at the base.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the same thinness and minimal detail, with the base slightly more visible.
description_view_2: A rear view, nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the object's uniform width and abstract shape.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, with the same minimalistic and slender appearance.
attribute_clothing_type: formless, featureless body with no visible clothing or accessories
